title: CCSU Date Sheet 2026 OUT

detail.title: CCSU Date Sheet 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: CCSU Date Sheet 2026 is out now for CBCS PG Campus Courses. Check Chaudhary Charan Singh University Meerut IVth and VIth semester exam schedule, exam dates, shift timings, and download the official CCSU Date Sheet 2026 PDF online.

content.text: Chaudhary Charan Singh University Meerut has officially released CCSU Date Sheet 2026 for CBCS PG Campus Courses on the official website on 15 April 2026. The June 2026 semester examinations (session 2025-26) for IVth and VIth semesters will begin from 24 April 2026. Students can check the exam schedule and download the CCSU Date Sheet 2026 PDF through the direct link provided here.

Chaudhary Charan Singh University (CCSU) Date Sheet 2026 Out for PG Campus Courses on 15 April 2026 for the session 2025-26 on the official website. The theory exam dates are available now, and students can download the official PDF from the direct link given below.
Download the CCSU Date Sheet 2026 PDF Here

links.text: Download the CCSU Date Sheet 2026 PDF Here

content.text: The CCSU Date Sheet 2026 contains the complete examination programme for CBCS and self-financed postgraduate courses conducted at the University Campus, Meerut. It covers both IVth Semester (Only University Campus) and IVth & VIth Semesters (Main/Ex/Back Paper) exams for June 2026.

rows: CBCS PG Campus Courses Semester Examinations
Shift I: 10:00 AM - 01:00 PM Shift II: 02:00 PM - 05:00 PM

sections.heading: How to Download CCSU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the CCSU Date Sheet 2026 from the official source in just a few clicks. The complete exam programme is available in PDF format for quick reference during preparation.

items: Open your browser and visit the official CCSU website or directly use the PDF link shared above.
Locate the examination section or the latest notifications area on the homepage.
Search for the CCSU Date Sheet 2026 for CBCS PG Campus Courses June 2026.
Click on the relevant PDF link to open the document.
Press the download icon or use Ctrl + S to save the file on your device.
Open the saved PDF, verify your course and paper details, and take a printout for daily reference.

content.text: Students are advised to check the official timetable carefully and keep a printed copy handy for exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in CCSU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official CCSU Date Sheet 2026 PDF includes all essential information required by students appearing in the June 2026 examinations. Below are the key details mentioned in the document.

items: Complete list of dates and days for all examinations
Two daily shifts with exact timings (10:00 AM to 01:00 PM and 02:00 PM to 05:00 PM)
Course-wise and paper-wise schedule with full paper names
Unique paper code numbers for every subject
Separate tables for IVth Semester (University Campus only) and IVth & VIth Semesters (Main/Ex/Back Paper)

Courses covered: M.Com, M.Sc Biotechnology, M.Sc Agriculture (Genetics, Entomology, Plant Pathology, Food Science, Seed Science, Horticulture), MFA, Yogic Science, Jyotirvigyan, Medical Microbiology and multiple MBA streams
Clear mention that the schedule is applicable only for University Campus, Meerut
Notification number and issuance date for official reference
